name: perseus-computing
description: Local-first context & memory MCP servers for AI coding agents — Perseus (live context engine) and Perseus Vault, formerly "Mimir"/"Mneme" (encrypted persistent memory).

plugins.name: perseus
plugins.description: Live context engine — pre-resolves git, services, tests, and memory into a ready context briefing at session start (compile-before-context, not runtime tool calls).

plugins.name: mimir
plugins.description: Perseus Vault, formerly "Mimir"/"Mneme" — local-first, encrypted (AES-256-GCM) persistent memory MCP server — 46 tools, SQLite + FTS5 hybrid search, single Rust binary, fully offline (no API key or model download).
